instructions.content: NEVER edit .context/index.yaml by hand — it is fully regenerated by regenerate-context-index.sh; manual edits are overwritten.
NEVER ignore stderr warnings from regenerate-context-index.sh — files excluded from the index are invisible to agents reading it.
Regeneration is idempotent — when in doubt about index freshness, regenerate. The source of truth is the frontmatter in each .md file, not the index.
When committing .context/ files, also stage the regenerated index: `git add .context/index.yaml`.
Check for missing frontmatter first with check-context-frontmatter.sh before regenerating, then fix all warnings before treating the index as complete.
